description: Long-term memory for AI-coded codebases — agents log the why behind every change and read it back.

cmd.description: The MCP server binary (selvedge-server) differs from the package name, so uvx needs --from.

cmd.description: Entry point that starts the MCP server over stdio. Plain `uvx selvedge` would launch the CLI instead.

name: io.github.masondelan/selvedge

runtimeArguments.description: Entry point that starts the MCP server over stdio. Plain `uvx selvedge` would launch the CLI instead.

title: Selvedge
